query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'signature_requests' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'signature_requests' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
id	int
documentId	int
documentType	enum
documentTitle	varchar
documentUrl	text
requestedBy	int
requestedByName	varchar
requestedAt	timestamp
dueDate	timestamp
reminderSent	tinyint
reminderSentAt	timestamp
message	text
signingOrder	enum
status	enum
totalSigners	int
signedCount	int

signedDocumentUrl	text
signedDocumentHash	varchar
